overview: Mono-Red Aggro in Standard relies on a fast curve and relentless pressure to close games before opponents can stabilize. By leveraging early threats like Hired Claw and mid-game finishers like Razorkin Needlehead, you overwhelm opponents with combat damage. Hearthborn Battler provides flexible board control and damage pushing to maintain momentum throughout the match.
win_conditions: Direct damage via Razorkin Needlehead's haste ability
Overwhelming board presence with Hired Claw and Hearthborn Battler
Closing out games before turn five through relentless combat pressure

keep_criteria: Hands containing one or two lands and a one- or two-drop
Hands featuring Hired Claw or Hearthborn Battler for early curve
Hands with Razorkin Needlehead paired with early mana sources
mulligan_criteria: Hands with three or more lands
Hands lacking a one- or two-drop creature
Hands composed entirely of three-drops or higher

early_game: Play lands and one- or two-drops strictly on curve
Attack immediately with Hired Claw to establish pressure
Use Hearthborn Battler to clear small blockers or push early damage
mid_game: Deploy Razorkin Needlehead to apply haste pressure and clear blockers
Trade efficiently to keep the opponent's board manageable
Look for opportunities to activate Hearthborn Battler before attacking
late_game: Commit all remaining resources to finish the game quickly
Use Needlehead's death trigger to remove final obstacles
Avoid stalling or playing defensively, as red aggro loses to attrition

key_cards.name: Razorkin Needlehead
key_cards.notes: Prioritize keeping in mulligans. Attack early and use its death trigger to clear opposing creatures or push direct damage.

key_cards.name: Hired Claw
key_cards.role: Early game pressure and curve filler
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to establish immediate board presence. Trade it into small blockers to protect larger threats.

key_cards.name: Hearthborn Battler
key_cards.role: Mid-game board clear and damage pusher
key_cards.notes: Use its activated ability to remove opposing creatures or deal direct damage. Hold up mana if needed to activate before attacking.

sequencing_tips: Activate Hearthborn Battler before attacking to remove blockers
Hold up mana for combat tricks when the opponent has removal
Attack with Hired Claw first to test for removal before committing Needlehead

matchups.advice: Push maximum damage early before they stabilize. Use Hearthborn Battler to clear their early answers.
Race them by playing on curve and trading up. Use Razorkin Needlehead to force unfavorable trades.
Mirror match dynamics require careful trading. Use Hearthborn Battler to clear their threats and push damage.
